_meta.role: Player character sheet — the living authority for every tracked value about Bill: attributes, skills, cultivation/abilities, gear, ammunition, money, banked cores/captures, and NPC warmth (relationships).
_meta.current_to: SESSION 30 IN PROGRESS — Day 28, on Floor 1 of the Ashen Descent (the Smoldering Wastes). Carries the S29-close state; the S30 change reflected here is ammo (7 hellfire rounds fired). S30 deltas NOT yet folded in (await S30 close per gm_operations.md close-out): the bound core named 'Ember' and the bond a step deeper; mana gently ticked. Phase-1 migration reconciliation (this pass): absorbed the facts campaign_state.md held that the JSON lacked — the Pem money line, the firm's recurring income, the patent portfolio, the old charm, the delve notebook, bench odds/documents — and added the relationships scaffold. Phase-2 (this pass): the relationships block is populated with the full recurring roster, paired to the npcs/ files. || S30 MECHANICS PASS (this edit): added the _combat_layer (modifiers, HP 40, AC 12, Speed/mana pointers), Hell Grenade's full charge/ME/radius formula, Spirit Gun damage, Deep Inspection's governing note, and weapons_combat. Drafted abilities left at their locked limits-economy costs. || S30 ABILITY-ECONOMY LOCK (this edit): added _ability_economy — the mana/ME cost models for Deep Inspection (read), the blueprint/drafting space, the mental Crafting Table, and Ember's well — built to the precise-tracking system and back-checked against this floor's spends. Added maker_core.well_current_ME tracking. Narrative S30 deltas still await close.

intrinsics.name: Deep Inspection
intrinsics.note: deep structural reach + clean resolve; reads aspect/rarity, weaves, essence-structure, made-stock, faults; out-resolves a western licensed read; reads across distance at heavier draw; reading a person stays surface (interior reads [Owner-private]); heavy reps incl. the live sight-share — flag a level at next class beat. Renders as terse plates (READ FORMAT, Day 26). Detectability: a wide/passive read sits unfelt even to an expert; a focused probe pointed at the man is felt (READ DETECTABILITY, measured off Pearce Day 26).
intrinsics.governing: Perception/Insight average = (Perception mod 0 + Insight mod 2)/2 -> +1 (round down). A READ, not an attack: no damage, no save DC. The governing value would set a contest/DC only if a read is ever opposed.

intrinsics.name: Schematic
intrinsics.note: keeps studied mechanisms and weaves as recallable, refinable internal drawings

seated_universal_skills.name: Steadyhand
seated_universal_skills.note: his one universal Passive seat; always-on, no upkeep; stills hand-tremor, aids fine hand-work

seated_universal_skills.name: Alchemy
seated_universal_skills.note: NEW S29; Crafting Table boon expansion; reagents, elixirs, coatings, material-transmutation; distinct from mundane Alchemy/Chemistry 4

seated_universal_skills.name: Hell Grenade
seated_universal_skills.note: +1 from the First Double Platinum achievement; lifts the old <=25-mana cap; upgraded every hellfire round already built

mechanics.charge: Every 5 mana poured in = +1d6. Charging = holding the draw (the failure-edge is charging under fire).
mechanics.core_bonus: ME of the seated core / 5, added flat (see essence_aspects_v1.md 8b for core ME). No core = ambient casing, +0.
mechanics.intellect_mod: +2 added on top (governs like a normal ability; not an exception)
mechanics.radius: starts at 10 ft; +5 ft per full 20 points of ROLLED damage (floor). Round down only at the very end.
modes: Ambient (thrown, no core): charge dice + Int mod only.
Core-seated (bigger grenade): + core ME/5. Junk-core economy = cheap dense payloads from bagged commons.
Finisher (seated AT a target's core through an opening): the blast PLUS the target's own core ME turned inward — situational, hard to land, deletes most things if it connects.
worked_examples_Lv2: C core (40 ME), full 30 mana: 6d6 + 8 + 2 = 6d6+10 (~31 avg), 15 ft.
A core (160 ME), full 30 mana: 6d6 + 32 + 2 = 6d6+34 (~55 avg), 25 ft.
Platinum floor-boss core (240 ME), full 30 mana: 6d6 + 48 + 2 = 6d6+50 (~71 avg), 30 ft.

seated_universal_skills.name: Spirit Gun
seated_universal_skills.note: launched orb, brief flight-hold, detonate-on-arrival; crude/short at Lv.1

mechanics.targeting: AIMED — eye-line aim, brief flight-hold, detonate-on-arrival. NO save; it hits where placed (like the gun). Crude/short range at Lv.1.
mechanics.note: Launched orb. The flight-hold is the first brick of the tied-off-knot / self-holding road. Scales (level)d6 + Int as it levels.

drafted_designs_unslotted.note: bore-bound, chamber-only, pulsed, forward-only field-driver; the WEAPON is built & proven; drive unslotted by choice

drafted_designs_unslotted.note: sustained barrier; ~70 creation; ~4/min; an earth-aspected version buildable now the filter has earth essence

maker_core.status: BOUND (S29) — a bonded familiar, first of its kind
maker_core.self_handle: the one who holds the fire so it doesn't burn the others

functions: hellfire refinery -> portable hellfire anywhere with ambient fire
keeps essence-conduits open under fire; drinks essence-sources dry (deep self-growing well)

holds drink-captures (the Colossus's pattern lives in its well)
maker_core.well_current_ME: ~80 ME, climbing (self-grown baseline + the 4 Floor-1 dog-cores + the Smoke Wisp, drunk this session). SPENDABLE FUEL — distinct from held PATTERNS (Colossus 960 / glass-wraith / cerberus / wisp), which are buildable blueprints, not spendable ME.
maker_core.economy_ref: Full cost model in _ability_economy.ember_well. Ember spends its OWN well, not Bill's pool; it touches the pool only via the larder (fills) or an over-fielded construct on an empty well (drains).

crafting_table.note: assembles any item Bill holds a blueprint for given materials + skill + mana; no forge/workshop/hours; expanded into alchemical transformation; the tell sharpened (maker-mark exposure up)

_ability_economy._note: S30 player-authored, locked. The mana/ME economy for Bill's System abilities, in the precise-tracking register (game_bible.md S3/S8; gm_operations.md S4). Through-line: the POOL pays for what comes out of Bill; EMBER'S WELL pays for what Ember does; holding a design ready or a blueprint in mind costs nothing — only making and using draw. Costs surface inline in bold-bracket tags when spent. Back-checked against Floor 1 of the Ashen Descent.

deep_inspection.formula: cost = depth_base x range_mult, + moving penalty, + hold; then Ember's share off the top.
deep_inspection.range_mult: 1 + (feet / 5) x 0.1.  In-hand/touching = x1.0 (the floor). 5ft x1.1, 10ft x1.2, 30ft x1.6, 40ft x1.8, 50ft x2.0, 80ft x2.6.
deep_inspection.moving_target: +0.5 to the range mult if the target is moving/evasive (harder to keep a grip on).
deep_inspection.hold: +1 per round per target for a PARKED read held across rounds (a snapshot is +0).
deep_inspection.ember_share: When Ember rides the read, knock ~1/3 off the total. A standing sweep Ember holds OUTRIGHT costs Bill ~nothing (well trickle). If Ember is busy/away, Bill pays full.
deep_inspection.thread_opposed: Pushing the read into something that RESISTS, or down a live tether toward a boss, costs FULL-BORE x range AND becomes a contest: 1d20 + read-governing (+1, the Per/Ins average) vs the thing's resistance. A failed contest or a noticed pull is the wake-risk. The one read that is both expensive and uncertain.
deep_inspection.governing: +1 (average of Perception mod 0 and Insight mod 2). A read is not an attack — no damage; the governing value only sets the contest on a thread/opposed read.
deep_inspection.floor_backcheck: Spun sweep (Ember-held): ~1 open / ~free hold. 4 dogs (tight, close, 1 rd parked): ~2-3 net. Skeleton wiring (hard, close): ~4 net. The key (full bore, ~35ft gateway, x1.7 -> 12x1.7~=20, less Ember's third): ~14 net — the floor's biggest read.

blueprint_and_drafting_space.principle: Holding costs nothing — capacity, not drain. The cost is at the two ends: building a design into a slot, and activating it.

costs.hold a captured blueprint in the Schemat: FREE (capturing one = a Deep Inspection read, costed above)
costs.hold a design seated in a drafting slot,: FREE (a readiness state, like the Active kit; felt as ceiling, not upkeep)
costs.seat / build a drafted design into a slo: its CREATION cost, one-time, from pool
costs.swap a slot (re-seat): slow + deliberate; pay the new design's creation again

blueprint_and_drafting_space.creation_use_scale: Anchored to the carried designs (Electromagnet ~28 create / ~2 use; Standing Ward ~70 create / ~4 per min). Simple aimed tool: 20-30 create / 1-3 use. Sustained or area field: 50-80 create / 3-6 per min. Master/complex: 80-150 create.
blueprint_and_drafting_space.slots: 4 total, 0 filled (drafting block above). Electromagnet is the live candidate for the magnet-fetch.

crafting_table.principle: Assembles a held blueprint into a real item (and alchemy transforms), pool scaled to the work; the three gates stand (blueprint held - materials owned-and-consumed - skill caps what's buildable). CONSTRUCTS do NOT run here — those are Ember's bench (ember_well.build_construct).
crafting_table.alchemy_band: Rides the same scale: coating 5-15, elixir 15-30, transmutation higher.
crafting_table.tell: Faster than a forge and LOUDER as a maker-tell — forge-less master-grade work is the sharpened exposure axis.

ember_well.principle: Ember spends ESSENCE (ME) from its OWN well — deep, self-growing, fed by drinking. It touches Bill's pool in only two places: the larder FILLS Bill's pool from the well; an over-fielded construct on an empty well DRAINS into the pool. Everything else is free to Bill.

costs.ride Bill's read: a slice of well -> that's the -1/3 off Bill's read cost
costs.share the gun's per-shot draw: a slice of well per shot -> lowers Bill's per-shot mana; the cost is SEAM-HEAT, not pool
costs.drink essence (conduit / core / wisp): NET-POSITIVE — fills the well. Free to Bill
costs.portable hellfire (work ambient fire ->: small, per working, from the well
costs.keep a conduit open under fire / lend th: modest, per round, from the well
costs.larder (feed Bill's filter): TRANSFER: drains well, fills pool (aspect-matched = clean conversion); a steady trickle, tops Bill over a quiet minute or two
costs.build a construct: well-ME = the construct's SIZE: sentinel ~30-50 - cerberus ~150-250 - the Colossus 'big dog' ~its whole 960 pattern
costs.sustain a construct: per-round well drain; UNTRAINED bleed is high (short-lived) -> trained, a trickle. Well runs dry mid-fight -> the draw reaches into Bill's POOL (the untested entanglement edge)

ember_well.cerberus_note: Bill HOLDS the cerberus blueprint, but at ~80 ME the well can't stand up a ~150-250 ME cerberus without bleeding it out fast. Drink a banked floor-boss core first (~240 ME each -> triples the well) to fund + sustain it.

declined: Path I — seat the essence-conduit grammar clean
Path II — the sighted-draw/filter/drain efficiency leap

health.condition: HEALTHY. No wounds. Mana bottomed at S29 close, recovering.
health.note: Precise tracking (S30): HP is the number (see _combat_layer.hp; formula (10+Might)+(DL x Might/2)). The condition ladder (Healthy/Winded/Hurt/Badly Hurt/Critical/Dying, game_bible.md §7) is the band of this number. HP shows in bold brackets when it changes; Bill's own number is always visible to the player.

relationships._scale: 1-100 warmth toward Bill; bands + movement/ceiling/visibility rules in game_bible.md. Bill never sees the number — he reads it from behavior. Movement surfaces via the change-tag (gm_operations.md §4). Read the band off the number; do not store the band. Qualitative texture and voice for each NPC live in npcs/.
relationships._status: PHASE-2 — populated from the campaign_state NPC section and the npcs/ files. Values are openers; they move in play per the change-tag and the close ledger. Dormant/one-off NPCs are added when they re-enter play and earn a file.

_combat_layer._note: S30 mechanics layer — the pf2e-granular combat numbers. Built on the same model as fortunes_folly_crew.json _combat_model. Bill's narrative/canon fields are untouched; this only ADDS derived combat values and the damage/DC math for his offensive Skills. Drafted abilities keep their locked limits-economy costs (creation/use) and get NO invented DCs/dice.

hp.note: Deliberately fragile — DL2 + Might 15 is a low body. Bill wins by not being hit; the crew keeps him out of melee. HEALTH still tracked as conditions narratively (see 'health'); this number is the granular-combat overlay.

speed.note: already on the sheet (attributes.Speed_derived); Precision 21 + Might/2 + Perception/3 + Insight/4, rounded up.

ac.calc: 10 + Precision mod 2 (higher of Might mod 1 / Precision mod 2) + armor 0 = 12
ac.note: Unarmored by choice (carries light — boots, haversack, no armor on the sheet). Fragile; the cover and the crew are his defense, not plate.

_combat_layer.ac_rule: AC = 10 + (higher of Might or Precision mod) + armor + shield.
